message:
Running command: 
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Checking state_out.json availability in key steps ==="
for step in 67 68; do
    path="$RUN_DIR/${step}-openroad*/state_out.json"
    if ls $path 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q state_out; then
        echo "Step $step: state_out EXISTS"
        ls $path 2>/dev/null | head -1
    else
        echo "Step $step: NO state_out"
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Step 68 state_out.json ==="
cat "$RUN_DIR/68-openroad-stamidpnr-3/state_out.json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
# Show ALL keys and their types
for k,v in d.items():
    if isinstance(v, str):
        print(f'  \"{k}\": \"{v}\"')
    elif isinstance(v, dict) and k == 'sdf':
        print(f'  \"{k}\": {{dict...}}')
    elif isinstance(v, dict) and k == 'metrics':
        print(f'  \"{k}\": {{metrics...{len(v)} keys}}')
    else:
        print(f'  \"{k}\": {v}')
" 2>/dev/null
